name: Cure Light Wounds
description: Heals 1d8+1 hit points of damage.

name: Detect Evil
areaOfEffect: Path 10 ft wide x 120 yds long
description: Reveals evil auras, creatures, or objects.

name: Detect Magic
areaOfEffect: Path 10 ft wide x 60 ft long
description: Reveals magical auras in the area.

name: Detect Poison
description: Detects poison in creature, object, or food/drink.

name: Light
description: Creates bright light in area.

name: Purify Food and Drink
description: Cleanses spoiled or poisoned food and water.

name: Remove Fear
description: Dispels fear effects; grants +4 vs. future fear for 1 hour.

name: Sanctuary
description: Prevents others from attacking caster; caster cannot attack.

name: Bless
description: Grants allies +1 to attack rolls and morale; +1 vs. fear.

name: Command
description: Forces subject to obey one-word command (flee, sleep, drop, etc.).

name: Protection from Evil
description: Creates barrier against summoned/conjured evil creatures.

name: Cure Disease
description: Cures all diseases affecting the subject.

name: Continual Light
description: Creates permanent bright light.

name: Find Traps
areaOfEffect: Path 10 ft wide x 30 yds long
description: Reveals natural and magical traps in area.

name: Hold Person
description: Paralyzes humanoid creatures.

name: Know Alignment
description: Reveals alignment of target.

name: Resist Fire/Cold
description: Grants immunity to normal fire/cold; +4 save vs. magical.

name: Silence 15' Radius
description: Creates zone of silence; no sound can be made within.

name: Slow Poison
description: Stops poison effects temporarily; allows additional saves.

name: Speak with Animals
description: Allows communication with animals.

name: Charm Person or Mammal
description: Charms humanoids or mammals.

name: Heat Metal
description: Heats metal objects, damaging those touching them.

name: Augury
description: Foretells outcome of immediate action (weal, woe, both, neither).

name: Animate Dead
description: Creates undead servants from corpses.

name: Create Food and Water
description: Creates enough food and water to sustain 1 man/level for 1 day.

name: Cure Blindness
description: Restores sight to blinded creatures.

name: Glyph of Warding
description: Creates explosive rune that damages intruders.

name: Locate Object
description: Indicates direction to known object.

name: Prayer
description: Blesses allies (+1) and curses enemies (-1) simultaneously.

name: Remove Curse
description: Removes curse from victim or object.

name: Speak with Dead
description: Allows corpse to answer questions (limited by its knowledge).

name: Dispel Magic
description: Removes magical effects equal to or below caster's level.

name: Neutralize Poison
description: Detoxifies venom or cures poisoned creature.

name: Protection from Evil 10' Radius
description: Extended protection from evil for entire party.

name: Speak with Plants
description: Allows communication with plant life.

name: Tongues
description: Grants ability to speak and understand other languages.

name: Cure Serious Wounds
description: Heals 2d8+1 hit points of damage.

name: Restore Strength
description: Restores lost strength immediately.

name: Summon Insects
description: Summons swarm of insects to harass creatures.

name: Poison
description: Injects deadly toxin; victim must save or die.

name: Free Action
description: Grants immunity to paralysis, slow, hold, and web effects.

name: Commune
description: Allows direct communication with deity for yes/no questions (up to 1 per level).

name: Create Water
description: Creates fresh water sufficient for 24 men/level for one day.

name: Dispel Evil
description: Banishes extraplanar evil creatures; +4 bonus to attacks.

name: Flame Strike
description: Calls down pillar of fire dealing 1d6+1 damage per level (max 6d6+6).

name: Insect Plague
description: Summons massive cloud of locusts that blocks vision and damages creatures.

name: Quest
description: Places geas on subject to perform specific task.

name: True Seeing
description: Grants ability to see through illusions, disguises, and invisibility.

name: Atonement
description: Restores fallen paladin/druid to good standing; removes guilt.

name: Find the Path
description: Shows fastest route to specified destination.

name: Heal
description: Cures all disease, blindness, and restores all hit points.

name: Blade Barrier
description: Creates wall of spinning blades dealing 1d8 damage per 2 levels.

name: Word of Recall
description: Instantly transports caster to previously designated sanctuary.

name: Fire Seeds
description: Creates acorns that explode into fire when thrown.

name: Part Water
areaOfEffect: Path 10 ft wide x 120 yds long
description: Parts water to create walkable passage.

name: Earthquake
description: Causes devastating earthquake; damages structures and creatures.

name: Gate
description: Opens portal to summon specific powerful being.

name: Holy Word
description: Utters sacred word that kills, paralyzes, or stuns evil creatures.

name: Regenerate
description: Grows back lost limbs; heals 1d8 HP permanently.

name: Restore
description: Fully restores life energy; raises dead without resurrection penalty.

name: Symbol
description: Creates powerful glyph with various effects (death, pain, persuasion, etc.).

name: Animal Summoning I
description: Summons 2d4 small animals to serve caster.

name: Repulsion
areaOfEffect: Path 10 ft wide x 60 yds long
description: Forces creatures to move away from caster.

name: Antimagic Shell
description: Creates sphere where magic does not function.

name: Chariot of Sustarre
description: Creates fiery chariot that transports party at great speed.

name: Elemental Summoning
description: Summons elemental creature to serve caster.
